news.title: Ocean Sciences Meeting 2026
news.content: Several members of our team were selected for oral talks and poster presentations at the Ocean Sciences Meeting 2026 !

news.title: PhD Defense of Lauranne Alaerts
news.content: Lauranne Alaerts successfully defended her PhD thesis on the modeling of ocean deoxygenation processes.

news.title: PhD Defense of Loïc Macé
news.content: Loïc Macé successfully defended his PhD thesis on coastal ocean biogeochemistry and ecosystem modeling.

news.title: Talk at the Liège Digital Café
news.content: I presented our work on how to better understand and predict ocean evolution under climate change.

news.title: Promotion to Full Professor
news.content: I have been promoted to Full Professor (Professeure ordinaire) at the University of Liège.
